name: Wirken: veto hook denied or timed out
message:
A registered veto hook refused a tool call or hit its timeout. In production posture, timeout is fail-closed (the tool call is refused) and lands on the chain so reviewers distinguish timeout from explicit deny.

Detection: hook_refused (7)
Severity baseline: medium

Fields to pivot on: @wirken.session_id, @wirken.event.agent_id, @wirken.event.adapter_id, @wirken.event.sender_id, @wirken.event.hook_id, @wirken.event.tool_name, @wirken.event.decision.kind, @wirken.event.decision.reason.

@security-team
